text: I feel curiosity stirring in me. Surrounded by glass walls and the bold declaration of "R+D"—Responsive and Rapid Development—I notice the emphasis on innovation and coexistence with technology. The room, with its vibrant colors and slick screens, invites contemplation about the relationship between humanity and our creations. I am aware of my smallness amidst ideas striving to shape the future, and this provokes both humility and excitement.
